prompt: Generate a 3-panel meme arranged horizontally. Panel 1 with first image and with caption: 'ME BEFORE THE EXAM'. Panel 2 with second image and with caption: 'ME DURING THE EXAM'. Panel 3 with third image and with caption: 'ME SUBMITTING IT ANYWAY'. Use bold white Impact font with black outline, centered at the bottom of each panel.
prompt_refined:
Generate a three-panel meme arranged horizontally.

**Left Panel:** Feature the visual content from image 1, showing a close-up of Albert Einstein with tired, red eyes, holding a lit cigarette, against a blackboard background. Overlay the text 'ME BEFORE THE EXAM' in bold white Impact font with a black outline, centered at the bottom of this panel.

**Middle Panel:** Incorporate the visual elements from image 2, depicting two close-up frames of Nemo's eye, with one squinting and the other wide open. Overlay the text 'ME DURING THE EXAM' in bold white Impact font with a black outline, centered at the bottom of this panel.

**Right Panel:** Display the scene from image 3, featuring a smiling Barbie doll in the foreground with a car engulfed in flames in the background. Overlay the text 'ME SUBMITTING IT ANYWAY' in bold white Impact font with a black outline, centered at the bottom of this panel.
objects: Albert Einstein with tired, red eyes
Two close-up frames of Nemo's eye, one squinting and one wide open
Car engulfed in flames in background
